task_description: GeoUMKM V4.0 Phase 2: Add dark/light mode toggle, Vitest testing framework with unit tests, loading states and error boundaries, and API deployment workflow

verification.summary: pnpm build produces 16 static routes successfully. pnpm test:ci passes all 25 tests across 5 test files. Tests exercise real logic (cn merging, CSV generation, API fallback/envelope, theme toggle, component rendering). Docker build skipped (no Docker in sandbox).

applied: ErrorBoundary retry now uses resetKey counter to force remount of children on reset, preventing infinite error loops
API workflow now triggers on pull_request events for PR validation; deploy step gated with if: github.event_name == 'push'
deferred: API workflow package path (./api vs ./api/dist) - depends on Azure Functions runtime config, no change needed unless deployment fails
Theme flash prevention testing - inline script is SSR concern not testable in jsdom
